Description

URL - https://fes-int.pre.private.defra.gov.uk/expectation-of-data-settings
Page title - Expectation of Data Settings
Journey - 4, Step 7

image-20260325-181717.png
 

Summary
The tables on the Expectation of Data Settings page are introduced by visually styled headings, such as “Current Data Ever Expected rules”, but these labels are not marked up programmatically using heading tags. Instead, they are implemented using paragraph (<p>) elements.

This negatively impacts screen reader users who rely on properly marked-up headings to understand the structure of the page and navigate between sections efficiently.

Change 
Mark visually styled section labels that introduce tables as proper semantic headings.

Text

Current Style

New Style

Current Data Ever Expected rules

Paragraph

H2

Acceptance Criteria
“Current Data Ever Expected rules” is coded using a correct semantic heading tag instead of a <p> element.
